default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Projectmark and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, review progress, and align on future directions.](https://fathom.video/share/ZVH52eDTrtnkMntYNTj5v98dRyBzFadp?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [14 articles pending review in CMS; Tom to review and provide feedback for publishing](https://fathom.video/share/ZVH52eDTrtnkMntYNTj5v98dRyBzFadp?tab=summary&timestamp=349.0)
  - [New content strategy: Repurpose Tom's LinkedIn posts into detailed blog articles](https://fathom.video/share/ZVH52eDTrtnkMntYNTj5v98dRyBzFadp?tab=summary&timestamp=736.0)
  - [Focus on construction-specific CRM content rather than generic CRM topics](https://fathom.video/share/ZVH52eDTrtnkMntYNTj5v98dRyBzFadp?tab=summary&timestamp=1258.0)
  - [Experiment with converting webinar content into articles for thought leadership](https://fathom.video/share/ZVH52eDTrtnkMntYNTj5v98dRyBzFadp?tab=summary&timestamp=581.0)

## Topics

### Content Review and Publishing

  - [14 articles ready in CMS awaiting Tom's review](https://fathom.video/share/ZVH52eDTrtnkMntYNTj5v98dRyBzFadp?tab=summary&timestamp=349.0)
  - [Only 3 out of recent batch were published](https://fathom.video/share/ZVH52eDTrtnkMntYNTj5v98dRyBzFadp?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
  - [Tom to review and provide feedback, aiming to push all content this week](https://fathom.video/share/ZVH52eDTrtnkMntYNTj5v98dRyBzFadp?tab=summary&timestamp=970.0)
  - [Balance between accuracy and publishing speed discussed; priority on quality and alignment with vision](https://fathom.video/share/ZVH52eDTrtnkMntYNTj5v98dRyBzFadp?tab=summary&timestamp=527.0)

### New Content Development Strategies

  - [Transcribed webinar on "How to win a project interview" as new content experiment](https://fathom.video/share/ZVH52eDTrtnkMntYNTj5v98dRyBzFadp?tab=summary&timestamp=581.0)
  - [Potential to unlock new angle: converting podcasts/sessions into content pieces](https://fathom.video/share/ZVH52eDTrtnkMntYNTj5v98dRyBzFadp?tab=summary&timestamp=625.0)
  - [Repurpose Tom's LinkedIn posts into blog articles](https://fathom.video/share/ZVH52eDTrtnkMntYNTj5v98dRyBzFadp?tab=summary&timestamp=736.0)
      - [Example: "It can't be just the CEO and executives responsible for business development in construction"](https://fathom.video/share/ZVH52eDTrtnkMntYNTj5v98dRyBzFadp?tab=summary&timestamp=874.0)
  - [Plan to copy-paste blog content into LinkedIn articles with accompanying posts](https://fathom.video/share/ZVH52eDTrtnkMntYNTj5v98dRyBzFadp?tab=summary&timestamp=897.0)

### SEO and Keyword Strategy

  - [Discussed balancing generic CRM keywords with construction-specific focus](https://fathom.video/share/ZVH52eDTrtnkMntYNTj5v98dRyBzFadp?tab=summary&timestamp=1258.0)
  - [Agreed to tweak titles and content to always include construction angle](https://fathom.video/share/ZVH52eDTrtnkMntYNTj5v98dRyBzFadp?tab=summary&timestamp=1374.0)
  - [Example: "How does CRM help your business" → "How does CRM help your construction business"](https://fathom.video/share/ZVH52eDTrtnkMntYNTj5v98dRyBzFadp?tab=summary&timestamp=1374.0)

### Quality Improvements

  - [Tom to provide specific feedback on 14 pending articles](https://fathom.video/share/ZVH52eDTrtnkMntYNTj5v98dRyBzFadp?tab=summary&timestamp=970.0)
  - [Aim for 100% accuracy and alignment with ProjectMark's vision](https://fathom.video/share/ZVH52eDTrtnkMntYNTj5v98dRyBzFadp?tab=summary&timestamp=527.0)
  - [Open to holding articles if they're not fully ready (even at 90%)](https://fathom.video/share/ZVH52eDTrtnkMntYNTj5v98dRyBzFadp?tab=summary&timestamp=514.0)

### Thought Leadership Content

  - [Leverage Tom's past LinkedIn posts for inspiration](https://fathom.video/share/ZVH52eDTrtnkMntYNTj5v98dRyBzFadp?tab=summary&timestamp=736.0)
  - [Sami to review Tom's LinkedIn and propose topics for expansion](https://fathom.video/share/ZVH52eDTrtnkMntYNTj5v98dRyBzFadp?tab=summary&timestamp=809.0)
  - [Focus on creating genuine industry leadership content from Tom's personal perspective](https://fathom.video/share/ZVH52eDTrtnkMntYNTj5v98dRyBzFadp?tab=summary&timestamp=861.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Tom to review 14 pending articles and provide feedback](https://fathom.video/share/ZVH52eDTrtnkMntYNTj5v98dRyBzFadp?tab=summary&timestamp=1460.0)
  - [Aim to publish all reviewed content this week](https://fathom.video/share/ZVH52eDTrtnkMntYNTj5v98dRyBzFadp?tab=summary&timestamp=981.0)
  - [Sami to review Tom's LinkedIn posts and propose topics for blog expansion](https://fathom.video/share/ZVH52eDTrtnkMntYNTj5v98dRyBzFadp?tab=summary&timestamp=809.0)
  - [Tweak proposed CRM article titles to include construction-specific angle](https://fathom.video/share/ZVH52eDTrtnkMntYNTj5v98dRyBzFadp?tab=summary&timestamp=1374.0)
  - [Prepare for next week's meeting (Tom may have scheduling conflicts due to company offsite)](https://fathom.video/share/ZVH52eDTrtnkMntYNTj5v98dRyBzFadp?tab=summary&timestamp=990.0)
  - [Continue developing construction-specific CRM content, avoiding generic CRM topics](https://fathom.video/share/ZVH52eDTrtnkMntYNTj5v98dRyBzFadp?tab=summary&timestamp=1258.0)

action_items.description: Review 14 articles in CMS, provide feedback, aim to push this week
Review & provide feedback on webinar-based article (priority)
Review Tom's LinkedIn posts for blog content inspiration
Create list of Tom's LinkedIn posts for potential blog conversion, share on Slack
Tweak proposed CRM-focused article titles to include construction angle
